aggregated_signal.dominant_time_pattern: night owls who pretend they're not
aggregated_signal.social_dynamic: one designated planner (Rohan) who immediately abandoned his own plan, and one dedicated documenter (Priya) who documented her own crisis
aggregated_signal.photographer_dynamic: one dedicated documenter (Priya uploaded 89 of 127 photos)
aggregated_signal.emotional_arc_summary: Started with genuine trekking intent that collapsed within 2 hours of arrival. Ended with collective agreement that not trekking was somehow the authentic Kasol experience.
aggregated_signal.peak_cooked_moment: Rohan suggesting a cafe detour at 9:47 AM on day one, which ended the 18-hour planned trek permanently and without formal announcement
recurring_behaviors_merged: food photographed before eating, every single time
Priya uploading photos before the meal was finished
group consensus achieved via WhatsApp poll even when sitting at the same table

lore_writing_hints.lead_with: the cafe pivot that killed the trek plan in under 5 minutes
lore_writing_hints.avoid: don't make it about the mountains, make it about the group's relationship with their own ambition
